Evidence Level: Moderate

Brain Workshop

Free, open-source dual n-back trainer with fully customizable parameters.

About This Tool

Brain Workshop is the original open-source dual n-back trainer. Fully customizable, runs locally with complete privacy and no registration.

How It Helps

  • Working memory — multiple stream tracking
  • Dual-tasking — spatial and auditory processing
  • Attention control — maintaining focus
  • Fluid intelligence — reasoning improvement
  • Customizable training — full parameter control
  • Complete privacy — no data collection

Best For

Memory & Brain Fog

Targets working memory deficits

ADHD & Focus

Dual-stream attention training

Anxiety & Panic

Private software eliminates performance anxiety

Depression & Mood

Free access removes barriers

Visit Brain Workshop →

Alternative Tools

Other tools you might find useful for similar goals.

Brain Trainer Pro

Dual n-back style training.

BrainHQ

Clinically proven memory training.
